checklist.name: larger stress test refutes the simple one/two-feature split
unresolved atom is not uniformly rescued by tested depth-three features
R42 remains non-promoted as a Route-E theorem

objective: Explain or refute B42/R42 using the c-band clock-carry transducer program.
recommendation: Do not continue blind threshold/residue atom splitting.  Either introduce a genuinely new state variable from the raw zero-clock winner/carry dynamics, or demote R42 from promotion target.

scope.not_refuted: all conceivable full layered R42 transducers
